title: Implement a fluent SQL query builder
description: qbuild.query.Query is a stub. Implement a fluent Query builder in qbuild/query.py. API contract: Query() starts an empty builder. .select(*columns) records the selected columns; .where(condition) appends a WHERE condition (it may be called multiple times); .limit(n) records a row limit. All of select/where/limit return self so calls chain. .build() returns the SQL string. Formatting rules, in this exact clause order SELECT ... [WHERE ...] [LIMIT n]: the SELECT clause is 'SELECT *' when no columns were selected, otherwise 'SELECT ' followed by the columns joined with ', ' (comma then single space); if at least one where() was called, append ' WHERE ' followed by the conditions joined with ' AND ', otherwise omit the WHERE clause entirely; if limit() was called, append ' LIMIT n', otherwise omit it. Example: Query().select('a','b').where('x=1').where('y=2').limit(10).build() returns exactly 'SELECT a, b WHERE x=1 AND y=2 LIMIT 10'. Implement Query in qbuild/query.py. Do not modify any test files.
